prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "9A. Controls and Procedures" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 9B. Other Information".
Find where Item 9A ends: right before the "Item 9B" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 9A that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Changes in Internal Control over Financial Reporting

There were no changes in our internal control over financial reporting (as such term is defined in Rules 13a-15(f) and 15d-15(f) of the Exchange Act)
during the most recent fiscal quarter that have materially affected, or are reasonably likely to materially affect, our internal control over financial
reporting.
